page_metadata.biotools__summary: FragGeneScanRs is written in Rust, so first head over to their installation instructions. Afterwards, you can install the crate from crates.io with cargo install frag_gene_scan_rs The installation progress may prompt you to add a directory to your path so you can easily execute it.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FragGeneScanRs is written in Rust, so first head over to their installation instructions. Afterwards, you can install the crate from crates.io with cargo install frag_gene_scan_rs The installation progress may prompt you to add a directory to your path so you can easily execute it.
